product_overview: An AI-enabled public services platform that helps citizens discover government services, match eligible schemes, file complaints, and get guided support through chat. The experience is designed to feel premium, clear, and accessible while making civic interactions faster and less confusing.
core_goals: Help citizens search and discover government services quickly
Match citizens to relevant welfare and public schemes
Enable easy complaint filing, tracking, and follow-up
Provide an AI chat assistant for guided navigation and support
Support secure authentication for citizen and admin workflows
Maintain an accessible, polished experience aligned with WCAG AA

features.name: Authentication via OTP
features.description: Allows citizens to request and verify one-time passwords for account access, supporting secure login and session management.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/otp/request with a valid phone number -> Receive 200 confirming OTP request was accepted -> POST /api/v1/auth/otp/verify with phone number and correct OTP -> Receive 200 with authenticated session details

POST /api/v1/auth/otp/request with an invalid or malformed phone number -> Receive 400 with validation error -> POST /api/v1/auth/otp/verify with an expired or incorrect OTP -> Receive 401 or 400 indicating verification failed

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Allows administrators to sign in with email and password to manage catalog services and complaint workflows.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/admin/auth/login with valid admin credentials -> Receive 200 with admin session or token -> Use authenticated session to access admin endpoints such as GET /api/v1/admin/complaints -> Receive 200 with complaint records
POST /api/v1/admin/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 unauthorized -> Retry login with missing or malformed email/password -> Receive 400 validation error

features.name: Service Search
features.description: Lets citizens search the public service catalog by keyword to find relevant services quickly.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/services/search with a relevant keyword query -> Receive 200 with matching services -> Display the returned service list to the citizen
GET /api/v1/services/search with an empty or unsupported query -> Receive 400 validation error or 200 with no matches -> Show no-results state and guidance to refine the search

features.name: Scheme Matching
features.description: Helps citizens discover schemes they may be eligible for based on provided criteria or profile inputs.
user_flows: POST or GET /api/v1/schemes/match with eligibility details -> Receive 200 with a list of matched schemes -> Present scheme recommendations to the citizen
POST or GET /api/v1/schemes/match with incomplete or invalid eligibility details -> Receive 400 validation error -> Show a prompt to correct missing information

features.name: AI Chat Assistant
features.description: Provides a conversational interface for citizens to ask questions, get guided help, and review prior conversations.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/chat/message with a citizen question -> Receive streamed AI response chunks -> Continue the conversation using the assistant's guidance
GET /api/v1/chat/conversations/:id with a valid conversation ID and authenticated session -> Receive 200 with conversation messages -> Render conversation history
GET /api/v1/chat/conversations/:id without authentication or with an invalid conversation ID -> Receive 401 unauthorized or 404 not found -> Show an access or not-found state

features.name: Complaint Filing and Tracking
features.description: Allows authenticated citizens to submit complaints, upload supporting files, and check complaint status.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/complaints/upload-url with authenticated session and file metadata -> Receive 200 with a pre-signed upload URL -> Upload attachment to storage -> POST /api/v1/complaints with complaint details and uploaded file reference -> Receive 201 with complaint ID

POST /api/v1/complaints with authenticated session and complete complaint details -> Receive 201 confirming complaint creation -> GET /api/v1/complaints/my -> Receive 200 with the user's complaint list -> GET /api/v1/complaints/:id -> Receive 200 with complaint status

POST /api/v1/complaints with missing required fields or invalid attachment reference -> Receive 400 validation error -> GET /api/v1/complaints/:id for a non-existent complaint ID -> Receive 404 not found or status unavailable

features.name: Complaint Management for Admins
features.description: Lets administrators review citizen complaints and update complaint status as part of service handling.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/admin/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with admin session or token -> GET /api/v1/admin/complaints -> Receive 200 with complaint queue -> POST /api/v1/admin/complaints/:id/status with a valid complaint ID and new status -> Receive 200 confirming the update

GET /api/v1/admin/complaints without authentication -> Receive 401 unauthorized -> POST /api/v1/admin/complaints/:id/status with invalid status data -> Receive 400 validation error or 404 if complaint is missing

features.name: Feedback on AI Responses
features.description: Allows users to submit feedback on AI assistant responses so the system can improve relevance and quality.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/feedback with a conversation or response reference and feedback payload -> Receive 200 or 201 confirming feedback submission -> Feedback is recorded for quality improvement
POST /api/v1/feedback with incomplete feedback payload -> Receive 400 validation error -> Prompt the user to retry with required details

features.name: Document Processing
features.description: Processes submitted documents to extract or validate information for downstream workflows.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/document/process with a supported document file or payload -> Receive 200 with extracted or processed document results -> Use results in a related user workflow
POST /api/v1/document/process with an unsupported file type or corrupted payload -> Receive 400 validation error -> Show an error instructing the user to upload a valid document

features.name: System Health Check
features.description: Provides a lightweight endpoint for monitoring backend availability and service health.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/healthz -> Receive 200 with healthy status -> Monitoring system marks the backend as available
GET /api/v1/healthz when the service is degraded -> Receive non-200 or failure response -> Monitoring system raises an alert

routes.description: Request OTP for a phone number
Send message, get streamed AI response
Admin catalog services list and create
Admin catalog services update and delete
Submit feedback on an AI response

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials

features.name: Search Services
features.description: Search for services in the catalog
